name: Warcaller's Chime of Dread
description: This chime's carvings depict skulls and other grim icons. When activated, it creates an aura of in a for 1 round. Creatures in the aura must attempt a save. On a failure, they become Frightened 1 (Frightened 2 on a critical failure). Affected creatures can't reduce their frightened condition below frightened 1 while the chime is ringing. You can Sustain the Activation to sustain the aura, up to a total of 5 rounds. This chime can be used only once per day, whether or not you Sustain the aura.
